question: For all products sold more than 3 times, what are their ids and descriptions?
sql: SELECT p.product_id, p.product_description FROM Products p JOIN Order_Items oi ON p.product_id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.product_id HAVING COUNT(oi.order_item_id) > 3;

back_translation.intent: 查询满足特定条件的产品及其描述

semantic.reason: 原始问题要求查询所有销售次数超过3次的产品的id和描述，但SQL反向翻译的描述中未包含销售次数的计算或过滤条件，且仅提到Order_Items表的order_item_status_code过滤条件，未明确关联到产品销售次数的统计逻辑。
